title: BackAlert
description: Warns you when hostile mobs approach from behind.
body:
# BackAlert

## Warns you when hostile mobs approach from behind.
![Custom alert icons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe549cc7406dbde2112972f73921fe460db04822.png)
![Warns you when a Whitch is approaching.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b136612a41bdb6e98c5b00c59c0b247a005ea05d.png)

BackAlert is a client-side mod that warns you when hostile mobs approach from behind.

When danger is detected, a compact alert panel slides in from the side of the screen and shows the mob type and distance at a glance.

It stays out of the way during normal gameplay, making it useful for exploration, mining, and avoiding surprise attacks.
